name: Quick & Easy Boston Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix (single layer size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix using the egg, water, and lemon extract, following label directions. Pour into a greased and floured 8-inch round cake pan. Do not use a larger pan as it causes the cake to be too flat.
2. Bake at 350°F for the time indicated on the cake package, or until the center of the cake springs back when lightly touched. Let the cake cool in the pan on a rack for 10 minutes, then remove and cool completely.
3. Prepare the pudding mix with milk and vanilla, following package directions. Cover with plastic wrap to prevent skin from forming and let it cool completely.
4. Split the cooled layer cake, fill with the cooled vanilla pudding, put the cake back together, and frost with enough chocolate frosting to cover the top. Store in the refrigerator.
